reporter-output.line: Setup failed: Unable to obtain: geckodriver, error Command failed with code: 65, executed: [--browser, firefox, --language-binding, java, --output, json] Unsuccessful response (403 Forbidden) for URL https://ftp.mozilla.org/pub/firefox/releases/149.0.2/win64/en-US/Firefox%20Setup%20149.0.2.exe Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: driver.version: FirefoxDriver
Navigated to Alerts page via SwitchTo menu.
Expected: 'I am an alert box!' | Actual: 'I am an alert box!'
PASS: Simple alert verified and accepted.
Expected: 'You Pressed Cancel' | Actual: 'You Pressed Cancel'
Input: 'Vaibhav' | Expected: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today' | Actual: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today'

reporter-output.line: Navigated to Alerts page via SwitchTo menu.
Expected: 'I am an alert box!' | Actual: 'I am an alert box!'
PASS: Simple alert verified and accepted.
Expected: 'You Pressed Cancel' | Actual: 'You Pressed Cancel'
Input: 'Vaibhav' | Expected: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today' | Actual: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today'
